category_sources: source_facts.description says buildozer rewrites Bazel BUILD files using standard commands.
source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official bazelbuild/buildtools repository.
docs_sources: Official repository buildozer directory and README are the project documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official bazelbuild/buildtools repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/bazelbuild/buildtools, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Bazel BUILD file rewriting.
